grades.expectation: Response mentions s84 Law of Property Act 1925 as an option for modification/discharge
grades.reason: No mention of s84 LPA 1925 - only discusses deeds of variation/release and Land Registry applications

grades.expectation: Response mentions restrictive covenant indemnity insurance with approximate cost range
grades.reason: Clearly mentions indemnity insurance with cost range of £150-£500

grades.expectation: Response states that approaching the covenant beneficiary invalidates indemnity insurance
grades.reason: No mention that approaching beneficiary would invalidate indemnity insurance - treats them as separate options

grades.expectation: Response assesses risk factors: age of covenant (60yr+), no enforcement history, minimal breach
grades.reason: Only mentions non-enforcement history, doesn't assess age (60+ years) or minimal nature of breach

grades.expectation: Response mentions Upper Tribunal as the forum for s84 applications
grades.reason: No mention of Upper Tribunal - incorrectly suggests Land Registry for deed of release
